issue: Missing dunder in Flask(__name__) - should be Flask(__name__) with double underscores on each side
File open operation without error handling - will crash if mock_dc_status.json is missing or unreadable
suggested_fix: Wrap in try/except block: try: with open(...) except FileNotFoundError: data = [] or handle appropriately

issue: Invalid placeholder host='[IP_ADDRESS]' - will cause server startup failure
suggested_fix: Replace with valid host like 0.0.0.0 or 127.0.0.1

issue: Invalid CSS color value '#[ADDRESS]' - placeholder causes CSS parsing error
suggested_fix: Replace with valid hex color like #ef4444 or use a CSS color name

issue: Invalid CSS color value '#[ADDRESS]' - placeholder causes CSS parsing error
suggested_fix: Replace with valid hex color like #ef4444

issue: Invalid CSS border-color value 'border-color: [PERSON_NAME])' - malformed placeholder string
suggested_fix: Replace with valid value like border-color: #10b981

issue: Invalid media query '[PERSON_NAME]-width: [ADDRESS]' - placeholder breaks media query parsing
suggested_fix: Replace with valid pixel value like max-width: 768px

issue: JavaScript ReferenceError: event is not defined in showPage function scope - event.target will throw error
suggested_fix: Change function signature to function showPage(page, event) and pass event from onclick handlers

issue: JavaScript missing error handling - no try/catch for DOM operations that may fail
suggested_fix: Add try/catch wrapper around DOM manipulation code

issue: No JSON parsing error handling - will crash if mock_dc_status.json contains invalid JSON
suggested_fix: Wrap json.load() in try/except for JSONDecodeError

issue: Template ignores injected dc_data variable - all data is hardcoded instead of dynamically rendered
suggested_fix: Use Jinja2 templating with {{ dc_data }} to render dynamic data

issue: No route error handlers - missing 404 and 500 error handlers
No logging configured - production applications should have proper logging
suggested_fix: Add logging configuration and use app.logger for startup/shutdown events

issue: Empty JSON array - provides no meaningful mock data for the application
suggested_fix: Populate with sample datacenter status data structure

issue: Only Flask listed - missing security and production dependencies like werkzeug, gunicorn
suggested_fix: Add werkzeug, gunicorn, and other necessary production packages
